signals.title: New Glenn forced an explosive rewrite for NASA’s plans to build a moon base
signals.summary:
NASA unveiled plans in March to develop a lunar base as part of its “Ignition” event that outlined the agency’s new direction in human spaceflight. The plans, though, were rather […] 
 The post  New Glenn forced an explosive rewrite for NASA’s plans to build a moon base  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Microsoft seeks Nevada tariff to shield ratepayers from data center costs
signals.summary: The proposal would require large-load customers to pay for infrastructure built specifically to serve their projects while preserving standard utility charges for broader grid services.

signals.title: AST SpaceMobile’s stock experiences rocky trading as SpaceX plans to launch its satellites into orbit
signals.summary: The company is developing a space-based broadband cellular network that could rival Elon Musk’s Starlink.

signals.title: US launches new strikes on Iran after helicopter downed
signals.summary: The U.S. launched strikes against Iran on Tuesday after Trump said Tehran had shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter in the Strait of Hormuz.

signals.title: Upstart chipmakers keep challenging Nvidia. This time it's Microsoft-backed D-Matrix
signals.summary: Nvidia challenger D-Matrix is entering full production of an AI chip it says is 10 times faster than a GPU and bypasses the memory shortage.

signals.title: Axiom and Prada advance design of spacesuit
signals.summary:
Axiom Space unveiled the design of another element of the lunar spacesuit it is developing for NASA in partnership with luxury designer Prada. 
 The post  Axiom and Prada advance design of spacesuit  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: US approves Kuwait request to buy nearly $2 billion of counter-drone platforms
signals.summary: Following recent Iranian strikes on Kuwait, the U.S. approved a potential foreign military sale of counter-UAS platforms made by Anduril.

signals.title: U.S. military launches strikes in retaliation for Iran downing helicopter
signals.summary: The latest clash with Iran over the Strait of Hormuz came as President Donald Trump repeated that a deal with Tehran could be reached within days.

signals.title: Trump family got about $500M from crypto venture — but investors saw steep losses
signals.summary: Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. celebrated a deal with Alt5 Sigma that generated roughly $500 million for the Trump family. The company's shares are down 93%.

signals.title: Supreme Court sends furnace case back to appeals court
signals.summary: The top court agreed with the Trump administration that Biden-era rules effectively eliminating non-condensing gas furnaces and water heaters from the market are based on an incomplete legal review.

signals.title: Judge restores 5% safe harbor rule for wind, solar
signals.summary: The Trump administration acted unreasonably in eliminating the 5% total cost threshold as a route for wind and solar projects to prove tax credit eligibility, a federal judge ruled.

signals.title: DOE reinstates $57M American Battery grant
signals.summary: American Battery Technology Co. won its appeal after the agency canceled the grant last year. It will continue plans to build a $115 million commercial-scale lithium refinery alongside its lithium-ion battery recycling efforts.

signals.title: Oil prices fall after U.S. Energy secretary says Hormuz ship traffic is increasing
signals.summary: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said a deal with Tehran to reopen Hormuz is close, but such an agreement still has not materialized.

signals.title: NASA to select new headquarters building by end of year
signals.summary:
NASA plans to find a new headquarters building by the end of this year while remaining in the Washington area. 
 The post  NASA to select new headquarters building by end of year  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: NASA interested in Hubble reboost if costs can be reduced
signals.summary:
As NASA prepares an attempt to reboost an astronomy spacecraft in a decaying orbit, it is open to doing something similar for Hubble, if its operating costs can be reduced. 
 The post  NASA interested in Hubble reboost if costs can be reduced  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Not-for-profit utilities turn to energy storage as data centers drive cost, reliability concerns
signals.summary: Reliability, power price hedging and avoided infrastructure investment are among the top reasons for the battery push.

signals.title: How load flexibility buys time for America’s data center boom
signals.summary: In markets where supply and demand are out of balance, grid connection increasingly comes with a choice: either bring the needed power yourself, or bring flexibility, write experts at ICF.

signals.title: FirstEnergy asks FERC to require data centers to pay for transmission interconnection costs
signals.summary: FirstEnergy’s proposal adopts a cost allocation practice from the gas pipeline sector. It comes ahead of the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission’s expected large load interconnection decision on June 18.

signals.title: White House border czar Tom Homan blames New York Gov. Hochul for promised ICE surge
signals.summary: Gov. Kathy Hochul in May signed a New York law that barred agreements with ICE that made it easier for the agency to detain immigrants who had been jailed.

signals.title: 5 corruption gaps Congress must close in the Clarity Act
Kalshi rolls out whistleblower services, employment verification to curb insider trading
signals.summary: The platform will require traders to disclose their employer's identity when trading on sensitive markets, a Wall Street Journal article first reported.

signals.title: GM eyes new battery chemistry to grow AI data center, energy storage business
signals.summary: GM is expanding efforts to capitalize on the expected growth of energy storage and data centers and the development of next-generation sodium-ion batteries.

signals.title: As LIV Golf faces a Saudi funding cliff, CEO says to take PIF 'at their word'
signals.summary: PIF is set to stop funding the golf league after the 2026 season, though LIV's Scott O'Neil could not guarantee that the final four tournaments will take place.

signals.title: Jim Cramer says tech stocks are losing the qualities that made them the leaders of the rally
signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said tech stocks are losing key traits that fueled their leadership since 2023.

signals.title: $70 billion immigration funding package passes in U.S. House in a win for Speaker Johnson
signals.summary: The U.S. House on Tuesday approved a $70 billion immigration enforcement funding package after months of debate.

signals.title: Energy Secretary Chris Wright says traffic in Strait of Hormuz is rising 'very meaningfully'
signals.summary: Wright said that describing the volume of oil exports out of Hormuz as increasing is a "fair statement."

signals.title: Circle debuts cirBTC on Ethereum to challenge Coinbase in the wrapped bitcoin market
Coinbase and Cardless unveil credit card backed by stablecoins

signals.summary:

signals.title: After FCAS demise, Germany’s options include ordering more F-35 warplanes
signals.summary: “Knowing what we know today, we wouldn’t set up a program in this way again,” Pistorius said.

signals.title: Putin offers Su-57 to India as New Delhi faces stealth fighter gap
signals.summary: The co-production and customization being offered by Russia marks one of the most expansive defense cooperation proposals made in recent years to India.

signals.title: US soldiers rescued by drone after Apache helicopter goes down near the coast of Oman
signals.summary: U.S. Naval Forces Central Command's Task Force 59 and the Army's 82nd Airborne Division led the rescue, with Air Force assets assisting, as well.

signals.title: SpaceX IPO explained: The price is set, but retail allocation still up in the air
signals.summary: Charles Schwab, Fidelity, Robinhood, SoFi and Morgan Stanley's E-Trade are among the brokerage platforms making SpaceX shares available.

signals.title: The May inflation numbers are due out Wednesday morning. Here's what to expect
signals.summary: If the Wall Street consensus is correct, the consumer price index is expected to show inflation running at a 4.2% annual rate.

signals.title: Anthropic releases Mythos-like AI model to the public two months after private rollout rocked Wall Street
signals.summary: Anthropic said the broad release is possible because of new safeguards that block responses in specific high-risk areas.

signals.title: Semiconductor shorts pile on as winning trade reverses
signals.summary: Investors' favorite trade is suddenly the one they can't stop betting against.

signals.title: Social Security retirement trust fund may be depleted in 2032, new trustees report finds
signals.summary: The Social Security Administration has released a report with new projections as to when the trust funds that help pay benefits may be depleted.

signals.title: Another jump in Boeing deliveries shows why we got into the stock and want to stay in
signals.summary: It's key to assessing the aircraft manufacturer's turnaround story under CEO Kelly Ortberg.

signals.title: Big, power-ready facilities drive industrial real estate market
signals.summary: Companies are looking for modern facilities that can accommodate power-hungry automation, industrial experts said in a report first provided to Facilities Dive.

signals.title: Can stadiums be energy efficient? USGBC map shows that many of them are
signals.summary: The U.S. Green Building Council has conferred LEED status on 31 stadiums in North America, from the 9,500-seat Southwest University Park in El Paso, Texas, to the 88,000-seat Estadio Banorte in Mexico City.

signals.title: FERC approves SPP non-firm, large-load transmission service
signals.summary: The Southwest Power Pool service aims to help data centers and other large loads get online quickly, but they can have their service cut when grid conditions are tight.

signals.title: USDA Secretary Rollins calls Texas ag chief 'unserious' amid screwworm threat
signals.summary: Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller lost his bid for a fourth term in a March Republican primary, despite Trump's endorsement.

signals.title: Iceye raises 1 billion euros to expand SAR satellite systems
signals.summary:
Iceye, a Finnish company that develops and operates radar imaging satellites, has raised more than 1 billion euros in a round that values it at more than 10 billion euros. 
 The post  Iceye raises 1 billion euros to expand SAR satellite systems  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Isar Aerospace raises 270 million euros for global launch expansion
signals.summary:
European launch company Isar Aerospace has raised 270 million euros ($312 million) to support its global expansion as it prepares for its next launch attempt. 
 The post  Isar Aerospace raises 270 million euros for global launch expansion  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Commercial launch providers shortlisted for China’s low-cost cargo spacecraft
signals.summary:

signals.title: Airbus-led alliance lobbies Germany on fighter jet project
signals.summary: Industry sources said the move did not amount to an attempt to launch a new fighter project following the collapse of the Franco-German FCAS program.

signals.title: Rivian is betting on its R2 EV to turn the automaker into a household name like Tesla
signals.summary: The R2 SUV is meant to transform Rivian from a niche EV manufacturer that sells luxury vehicles into a more mainstream brand like U.S. EV leader Tesla.

signals.title: JPMorgan Chase plans to deploy more powerful AI agents this year
signals.summary: JPMorgan Chase's move suggests long-running AI agents are close to clearing the security and governance hurdles that have slowed adoption inside big companies.

signals.title: Jeffrey Epstein's former assistant Lesley Groff interviewed by House panel
signals.summary: Groff worked for Epstein for nearly 20 years, and her name appears more than 150,000 times in the Epstein files released by the Department of Justice.

signals.title: Home sales surged in May to the highest level since December
signals.summary: Home sales rebounded in May as mortgage rates dropped back a bit in April, but prices are still rising.

signals.title: Bitcoin's brutal sell-off sparks a flurry of trading in related stocks, including one big bullish bet
signals.summary: The year has been a rocky one for the flagship cryptocurrency, but traders aren't backing away from the space.

signals.title: 5 takeaways from airline CEOs' biggest annual gathering
signals.summary: Airline CEOs met in Rio de Janeiro at IATA, the International Air Transport Association's annual meeting.

signals.title: SpaceX employee group creates low-fee wealth management option with Choreo for post-IPO
signals.summary: The deal marks a bold experiment in the wealth management industry that could shift the balance of power from advisory firms to wealthy groups of investors.

signals.title: The 'SaaSpocalypse' is over, says private equity giant Thoma Bravo. Here's why it sees an AI boom for software
signals.summary: Thoma Bravo founder Orlando Bravo says AI offers an "enormous tailwind" for software companies.

signals.title: Nuvalent shares surge 39% after UK's GSK agrees to buy the cancer drugmaker for $10.6 billion
signals.summary: The deal comes at a time of biotech dealmaking frenzy, driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets and drugmakers' race to bolster pipelines.

signals.title: FCC lets Amazon Leo miss deployment deadline with temporary spectrum penalty
signals.summary:
Amazon no longer faces a July 30 cutoff for deploying half its planned 3,232 broadband satellites, but the reprieve comes with a temporary loss of spectrum priority that could give SpaceX and other rivals more leverage in orbit.

signals.summary:

signals.title: US Navy F/A-18 Super Hornet strikes, disables oil tanker in Gulf of Oman
signals.summary: An F/A-18 Super Hornet assigned to the aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln fired a precision munition into the vessel's engineering and steering spaces.

signals.summary: Anduril President Christian Brose discussed the need to develop cheaper weapons systems at scale to avoid quick depletion of exquisite munitions.

signals.summary: The technology aims to find small, low-flying drones, including those connected to operators via long, fiber-optic command wires.

signals.summary: “This year, we’re already slowing down recruitment because not only are we recruiting better, but we’re retaining people better," a service leader said.
